_metadata.labeling_rule: Assign exactly ONE class. Resolve overlaps using priority: Fire > Landslide > Earthquake > Typhoon or Storm Damage > Flood > Other. (i.e. visible flame/smoke always wins; soil/mudflow from a slope beats generic water; dry structural collapse beats wind damage; wind-tearing beats standing water; standing water with no structural damage is Flood.)

discriminator_notes.Earthquake Damage: DRY structural collapse + ground fissures. No water, no smoke, no soil/mud from a slope.
discriminator_notes.Flood: Standing or slow water as the dominant feature. Structures INTACT. No mud-from-slope, no flame.
discriminator_notes.Fire: Active flame, glowing embers, or smoke plume is the dominant feature.
discriminator_notes.Typhoon or Storm Damage: WIND-caused damage: torn/peeled/snapped/blown-away. Standing water is NOT the focus.
discriminator_notes.Landslide: Mud/soil/rock that originated from a SLOPE. Always shows earth + an incline or earth-burial.
discriminator_notes.Other or No Disaster: No damage of any kind. Calm, dry, intact, orderly scenes.

Earthquake Damage: Dry collapsed concrete high-rise, no water or smoke, rubble piled on dry pavement.
Cracked apartment wall with peeling plaster, interior fully dry, no flooding.
Multistory building tilted sideways onto a dry street, structure intact but leaning.
Snapped concrete columns exposing twisted rebar, no fire, no water.
Wide ground fissure splitting a dry paved road, clean fracture edges.
Pancake-collapsed floors stacked on each other, dry dust in the air.
Interior room with overturned furniture and fallen ceiling, completely dry.
Dry brick house with caved-in roof, debris is masonry not soil.
Buckled dry sidewalk with uplifted concrete slabs, no liquid present.
Detached building facade lying on a dry road, clear sky, no smoke.
Cracked dam or bridge pier on dry land, fracture lines visible, no flow.
Collapsed dry stone wall, scattered blocks, no mud and no flames.
Flood: Urban street as standing brown water, buildings intact and undamaged above the waterline.
Murky water filling an intact living room, furniture standing, walls uncracked.
Calm sheet of standing water covering an intact paved road to the horizon.
Water risen to window level around an undamaged house, no structural cracks.
People wading through still chest-deep water, surrounding buildings intact.
Flat muddy water covering crop fields, no slope, no soil mound, fields intact.
City lights reflecting on vast motionless standing water at night, buildings dry above.
Parked cars submerged to the doors in still water, bodywork intact and unburnt.
Town square as a shallow uniform sheet of dirty standing water, no debris piles.
Slow river spilling over its bank onto flat land, no mudflow, structures intact.
Indoor tiled floor under a thin layer of still water, room otherwise undamaged.
Intact bridge with calm water reaching its underside, no collapse, no flow damage.
Fire: Thick black smoke plume dominating the frame, rising from a building.
Bright orange flames actively consuming a structure at night.
Glowing red embers and charred black wood smoldering in ruins.
Wildfire flame front advancing across a dry hillside, smoke above.
Car fully engulfed in orange flames, heavy smoke pouring out.
Dense grey smoke billowing from a broken window, glow inside.
Forest section ablaze at night, trees outlined by orange fire.
Yellow and red flames erupting upward from a debris pile.
Charred blackened building shell still emitting wisps of smoke.
Flames and sparks bursting from a vehicle engine compartment.
Distant ridge line glowing orange under a smoke-darkened sky.
Interior room lit only by active flames, walls scorched black.
Typhoon or Storm Damage: Roof sheeting peeled and torn off a building by wind, metal bent backward, no flooding.
Snapped utility poles and shredded cables strewn across a dry road by wind.
Tree trunk split and splintered by wind force, branches stripped, ground dry.
Billboard and signage twisted and bent flat against a wall by gusts.
Wind-blown debris and torn awnings scattered across a dry sidewalk.
Shattered windows blown inward, frames bent, no water on the floor.
Tin shack walls peeled open and crumpled by wind, contents exposed.
Uprooted tree toppled onto a dry road, root ball lifted by wind.
Sheets of corrugated metal flung and wrapped around a fence by wind.
Scaffolding and temporary structure blown over and tangled, ground dry.
Palm trees bent hard and fronds stripped under a dark storm sky, no flooding.
Collapsed lightweight roof scattered as wind-blown panels, no mud or fire.
Landslide: Large pile of soil and rocks from an upslope source blocking a mountain road.
Brown mudflow streaming down a sloped street, originating from a hillside above.
House partially buried by brown earth sliding from the slope behind it.
Fresh exposed-earth scar carved down a steep hillside, debris fanned below.
Boulders and soil debris fanned across a road from a collapsed slope edge.
Valley floor filled with grey mud and splintered trunks from upstream slope failure.
Vehicles trapped and half-buried under a tongue of dark wet soil from a bank.
Retaining wall overtopped by cascading wet soil from the slope above.
Steep incline with disturbed vegetation and a fresh slump of loose earth.
Highway section sheared away and replaced by a slope of loose collapsed dirt.
Mud-coated debris cone spreading from a gully mouth onto flat ground.
Cracked tilting hillside with a detaching soil block above buildings.
Other or No Disaster: Clear blue sky over an intact city skyline, no smoke and no damage.
People casually walking on a dry, clean, intact sidewalk.
Well-lit urban street at night with normal orderly vehicle traffic.
Green healthy trees and grass in a sunny, tidy park.
Calm river reflecting sunlight, banks intact, no debris.
Tidy interior room with organized furniture and warm lighting.
Dry paved road with normal cars and no visible damage.
Farmer tending healthy crops in a peaceful intact green field.
Starry night sky above an undisturbed, undamaged landscape.
Pet resting on a clean dry indoor floor, room orderly.
Buildings standing tall and fully intact under bright sun.
Quiet well-maintained residential street at dusk, everything intact.
